headline: Double Vision? Find Out Why in Chennai
subheadline: Double vision can stem from eye muscle, nerve, or neurological causes. FAICO-certified Dr. Rajeswari provides specialized evaluation.
metaDescription: Experiencing double vision? See FAICO-certified Dr. Rajeswari in KK Nagar, Chennai for specialized evaluation. Call or book online.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Neuro-Ophthalmology Expertise
whyPatientsChoose.description: Double vision can have complex causes -- our fellowship training means it's evaluated properly, not dismissed.

symptoms: Seeing two images of a single object
Double vision that's new or worsening
Double vision only in certain directions of gaze
Double vision with drooping eyelid or headache

processSteps.title: Specialized Assessment
processSteps.description: Detailed evaluation of eye alignment, muscle function, and nerve control.

processSteps.title: Identifying the Source
processSteps.description: Determining whether the cause is muscular, nerve-related, or neurological.

processSteps.title: Coordinated Treatment
processSteps.description: Direct treatment or neurology referral, based on what's actually found.

landingFaqs.question: Is double vision always serious?
landingFaqs.answer: Not always. Some causes are relatively straightforward, while others require more urgent investigation. The purpose of the evaluation is to determine which applies in your case.

landingFaqs.question: Will I need brain imaging?
landingFaqs.answer: Not everyone with double vision needs imaging. The decision depends on the findings from your examination and whether there are signs suggesting a neurological cause.

landingFaqs.question: What happens after the cause is identified?
landingFaqs.answer: That depends on the diagnosis. Some patients need observation, some benefit from glasses or prism correction, some require treatment of an underlying medical condition, and others may need coordinated care with neurology.

causeExploration.title: Why Double Vision Should Be Evaluated Carefully
causeExploration.causesIntro: Double vision can occur for several different reasons. Sometimes the cause is related to the eye muscles themselves. In other cases, it may involve the nerves controlling those muscles, or a condition affecting the brain's visual pathways. The purpose of the examination is not simply to confirm that double vision exists, but to determine where the problem is originating and what should happen next.
commonCauses: A neurological condition affecting visual pathways
causeExploration.urgentTitle: When Should Double Vision Be Evaluated Promptly?
causeExploration.urgentIntro: Double vision should generally be assessed soon. A few situations deserve especially prompt evaluation:
urgentScenarios: Double vision with drooping of the eyelid
Double vision with facial weakness or numbness

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: Doctor, do I need to worry that this is something neurological?
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: Not every case of double vision is neurological, but it is one of the possibilities we consider carefully. The examination helps determine whether the problem is coming from the eye muscles, the nerves controlling them, or another part of the visual system. Often the most important outcome of the consultation is understanding exactly which category you fall into and whether any further testing is needed.
